name: navigator-vms
description: Navigator VMS — run scripts from the repo root

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix web
scripts.dev:full: npm run docker:up && npm run dev:next
scripts.dev:next: npm run docker:up && npm run predev:api && concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui:proxy"
scripts.dev:full:host: npm run docker:up && concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:host:proxy"
scripts.dev:host:proxy: cross-env API_PORT=3000 npm run dev:host --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:ui:proxy: cross-env API_PORT=3000 npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.docker:up: node scripts/check-docker.mjs && docker compose up -d postgres redis web worker
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix web
